ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Continued To Dec-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Duane Leonard appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Mr. Leonard stated that he had a properly prepared petition, that he filed it on October 19th, but it has not been processed, and that the real property is in contract and the sale should close by the end of the month. Status on close of estate is continued to December 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Duane Leonard (Administrator) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Mr. Leonard stated that he is prepared to file a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to October 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov for and with Kelly Kristi (Objector).

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Dobrov stated that Ms. Kristi is objecting to the appointment of her Sister. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Kristi's objection is to filed, served and courtesy copies are to be provided to the Court no later than May 29, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
